title: Start With You
theme: Discover Your Purpose. Build Your Future.

prompts.label: What kind of future do I want?
What kind of advisor do I want to become?
What fears do you need to overcome?

learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Start With You
learn.summary: Welcome, discover yourself, build your dream, meet your squad, and reflect.
bullets: Dream Builder: lifestyle, income, travel + 3 images

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Classroom session
workshop.summary: Mark complete after your 3-hour classroom and workshop.
bullets: Coach-led session using the Week 1 deck

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: Reflection journal
reflection.summary: Capture what inspired you, what you fear, and what excites you.
prompts: What fears do you need to overcome?

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Vision & Success Blueprint
assignment.summary: Finalize your Dream Board and write your Personal Vision and Success Blueprint.
bullets: Finalize Dream Builder answers and 3 images
Success Blueprint: why, 3 goals, income, people, commitment

portfolio.label: Portfolio
portfolio.headline: Week 1 portfolio
portfolio.summary: Review Dream Board, Vision & Blueprint, and Reflection — then submit to lock.
bullets: Submit locks editing until faculty reopens
